title: High-Fashion Editorial Portrait
sourceTitle: Prompt Prompt Photorealistic High Fashion Editorial Portrait

imagePrompts.prompt:
{
  "prompt": "Photorealistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a stunning 22-year-old East Asian woman with flawless porcelain skin, sharp almond-shaped eyes, high cheekbones, and full lips. She has long, wavy, light ash-brown hair with subtle blonde highlights, wearing large round pink-tinted sunglasses and oversized silver hoop earrings. Fierce, confident expression as she crouches low in a dramatic low-angle shot, looking directly down at the camera. She wears an oversized glossy bright-red patent leather trench coat with wide belt and silver hardware, layered thick silver chain necklaces, and a black crossbody bag with heavy chain strap. Shiny red vinyl pants that catch the light, paired with massive futuristic chunky platform boots in metallic silver and red with thick laces, buckles, and dangling chains — one boot dramatically extended into the foreground with bright lens flare. Background is a towering glass skyscraper cityscape shot from extreme low angle against a bright blue sky with soft white clouds. Cinematic lighting, strong sunlight, vibrant orange-red color grading, cyberpunk-meets-high-fashion aesthetic, ultra-detailed textures on glossy materials, sharp focus, dramatic composition, 8K photorealistic, Vogue editorial style, powerful female presence",

  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, deformed hands, extra limbs, cartoon, illustration, painting, overexposed, underexposed, text, watermark, logo, ugly, poorly drawn face, bad anatomy, Asian stereotypes, traditional clothing, casual wear, smiling, looking away, soft lighting, pastel colors",

  "style": "photorealistic high-fashion photography",
  "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
  "quality": "ultra detailed, 8k, masterpiece",
  "lighting": "bright daylight with strong lens flare and high contrast",
  "camera_angle": "extreme low angle, Dutch tilt, looking up at subject",
  "model_ethnicity": "East Asian",
  "mood": "fierce, futuristic, urban, powerful, confident",
  "color_palette": "vibrant red, orange, metallic silver, deep blue sky",
  "fashion_elements": [
    "oversized glossy red patent trench coat",
    "shiny red vinyl pants",
    "futuristic metallic platform boots with chains",
    "round pink-tinted sunglasses",
    "layered silver chains",
    "large hoop earrings"
  ],
  "setting": "futuristic Asian megacity street, towering glass skyscrapers, blue sky",
  "composition": "subject dominates frame, strong foreground boot, dramatic perspective"
}

Make the aspect ratio 3:4
